name: Hanatarash
description:
'''Hanatarashi''' ({{nihongo2|ハナタラシ}}), meaning "sniveler" or "snot-nosed" in Japanese, was a [[noise music|noise]] band created by [[Yamantaka Eye]] in [[Osaka]], [[Japan]] in 1983. The other core member during the early years was Ikuo Taketani. After the release of the first album, the "I" was dropped and the name became "Hanatarash". Both men later formed [[Boredoms]], and Taketani played drums for [[Zeni Geva]].

They used a variety of unusual noise-making objects, including [[power tool]]s, [[drill]]s, and heavy machinery.
